title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 CodeAnt AI is at the forefront of cybersecurity innovation, dedicated to building a comprehensive offensive and defensive security platform. Backed by prestigious investors such as Y Combinator, Entrepreneur First, and Uncorrelated Ventures, we are a rapidly expanding team of 20 professionals operating across San Francisco and Bangalore. Our platform is trusted by Fortune 500 companies and government agencies, enabling them to develop and deploy secure, high\\-quality code at scale. At CodeAnt AI, we are committed to pushing the boundaries of technology to create robust security solutions that meet the dynamic needs of modern digital landscapes.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Software Engineer to join our team and take ownership of our AI code quality and security platform. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and enhancing our entire security ecosystem, spanning frontend, backend, and infrastructure components. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including design and engineering, to deliver innovative solutions that address complex security challenges. Your hands\\-on approach will also involve providing technical support, guiding customer success initiatives, and ensuring seamless implementation of our platform. This position offers a unique opportunity to be an integral part of building a next\\-generation security product that has the potential to redefine industry standards.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess between 2 to 5 years of full\\-time professional experience in software development, with a strong background in backend and cloud technologies. A degree in Computer Science or a related field from a Tier 1 institution such as IITs or NITs is preferred, though not mandatory. Proven expertise in Python, particularly with frameworks like FastAPI and concepts of concurrency, is essential. Experience with frontend technologies such as ReactJS and Node.js is also required. Familiarity with cloud platforms, especially AWS, along with containerization tools like Docker, is necessary to succeed in this role. Additionally, experience working with large language models (LLMs) and a passion for cybersecurity are highly desirable traits for candidates applying for this position.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a core member of our engineering team, your responsibilities will include owning and developing our AI\\-driven code quality and security platform from end to end. You will be tasked with designing, building, and maintaining scalable backend services using Python and FastAPI, ensuring high performance and reliability. You will also contribute to the frontend development using ReactJS and Node.js, creating intuitive interfaces for users. Infrastructure management on AWS and Docker will be part of your daily tasks, enabling seamless deployment and scaling of our platform. Collaborating closely with design and engineering teams, you will translate product requirements into technical solutions. Additionally, you will provide technical support and guidance during customer onboarding and implementation, ensuring our clients derive maximum value from our platform. Continuous learning, innovation, and a proactive approach to problem\\-solving will be key aspects of your responsibilities.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Joining CodeAnt AI means becoming part of a pioneering company with significant growth potential. You will have the opportunity to be the eighth engineer in a fast\\-growing startup, directly influencing the development of a billion\\-dollar developer tools platform. Working alongside founders and senior leadership, you will experience a high level of ownership and visibility, enabling you to see the tangible impact of your work from day one. We offer competitive compensation packages, including attractive salary, equity options, and comprehensive benefits. Our environment fosters continuous learning and professional development, providing the resources and support needed to excel in your career. Being YC\\-backed and in a phase of rapid expansion, you will be at the forefront of technological innovation in cybersecurity, shaping the future of secure software development.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 CodeAnt AI is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring process is designed to be fair and merit\\-based, ensuring that all qualified candidates have an equal opportunity to join our team and contribute to our mission of building secure and innovative security solutions.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Job Summary**
 Responsible for delivering an enterprise class NetApp software product. Software Engineer thrives as part of a high\\-performance team tasked with finding creative solutions to the most profound data challenges customers face. Wielding cutting\\-edge technologies, you help create new products and services that bring NetApp’s data fabric to every application, anywhere.
   

  

 Job Requirements
   

  

* Deliver reliable, innovative storage and data management products.
* Develops, modifies, and executes automated software test plans.
* Analyzes and writes test standards and procedures.
* Maintains documentation of results
* Works closely with development engineers in feature development and resolution of problems. Analyze problems and apply to proper test tools and methods to create opportunities to contribute clean code
* Improve productivity by refactoring and improving existing tools and workflows.


 Education
   

  

 IC \\- Typically requires a minimum of 8 years of related experience.Mgr \\& Exec \\- Typically requires a minimum of 6 years of related experience.
   

  

 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in\\-office and/or in\\-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise\\-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment \\- make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Software Engineer - Backend Java
description:
**This job is with Kyndryl, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ\\+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly.**
**Who We Are**
 At Kyndryl, we run and reimagine the mission\\-critical technology systems that drive advantage for the world's leading businesses. We are at the heart of progress; with proven expertise and a continuous flow of AI\\-powered insight, enabling smarter decisions, faster innovation, and a lasting competitive edge. For our people\\-Kyndryls\\-that means doing purposeful work that powers human progress. Join us and experience a flexible, supportive environment where your well\\-being is prioritized and your potential can thrive.
   

  

**The Role**
 Are you passionate about solving complex problems? Do you thrive in a fast\\-paced environment? Then there's a good chance you will love being a part of our Software Engineering \\- Development team at Kyndryl, where you will be able to see the immediate value of your work.
   

  

 As a Software Engineering \\- Developer at Kyndryl, you will be at the forefront of designing, developing, and implementing cutting\\-edge software solutions. Your work will play a critical role in our business offering, your code will deliver value to our customers faster than ever before, and your attention to detail and commitment to quality will be critical in ensuring the success of our products.
   

  

 Using design documentation and functional programming specifications, you will be responsible for implementing identified components. You will ensure that implemented components are appropriately documented, unit\\-tested, and ready for integration into the final product. You will have the opportunity to architect the solution, test the code, and deploy and build a CI/CD pipeline for it.
   

  

 As a valued member of our team, you will provide work estimates for assigned development work, and guide features, functional objectives, or technologies being built for interested parties. Your contributions will have a significant impact on our products' success, and you will be part of a team that is passionate about innovation, creativity, and excellence. Above all else, you will have the freedom to drive innovation and take ownership of your work while honing your problem\\-solving, collaboration, and automation skills. Together, we can make a difference in the world of cloud\\-based managed services.
   

  

 Your Future at Kyndryl
   

  

 The career path ahead is full of exciting opportunities to grow and advance within the job family. With dedication and hard work, you can climb the ladder to higher bands, achieving coveted positions such as Principal Engineer or Vice President of Software. These roles not only offer the chance to inspire and innovate, but also bring with them a sense of pride and accomplishment for having reached the pinnacle of your career in the software industry.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 You're good at what you do and possess the required experience to prove it. However, equally as important \\- you have a growth mindset; keen to drive your own personal and professional development. You are customer\\-focused \\- someone who prioritizes customer success in their work. And finally, you're open and borderless \\- naturally inclusive in how you work with others.
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Experience**
* 6 years of experience working as a software engineer on complex software projects
* Excellent coding skills and solid development experience (Java, Sprint Boot, etc.), AWS (Lambda, S3, SQS, SNS, CloudWatch) with debugging and problem\\-solving skills
* Software development methodologies, with demonstrated experience developing scalable and robust software
* Experienced in relational and NoSQL databases, data mapping, XML/JSON, Rest based web services
* Knowledge of architecture design \\- Microservices architecture, containers (Docker \\& k8s), messaging queues
* Deep understanding of OOP and Design patterns


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, related technical field, or equivalent practical experience
* Certification in one or more of the hyperscalers (Azure, AWS, and Google GCP) \\- otherwise, you can obtain certifications with Kyndryl
* Experience with DevOps tools and modern engineering practices


**Being You**
 The "Kyn" in Kyndryl means kinship, which represents the strong bonds we have with each other, our customers and our communities. We focus on ensuring all Kyndryls feel included and we welcome people of all cultures, backgrounds, and experiences. Even if you don't meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply. We believe in growth, and we're excited to see what you can bring. At Kyndryl, employee feedback has told us that our number one driver of employee engagement is belonging. That sense of belonging \\- being a valued, respected, trusted member of the team \\- is fundamental to our culture and fueling great experiences for our customers. This dedication to welcoming everyone into our company means that Kyndryl gives you the ability to thrive and contribute to our culture of empathy and shared success. That's The Kyndryl Way.
   

  

**What You Can Expect**
 Your career with us isn't just a job\\-it's an adventure with purpose. We offer a dynamic, hybrid\\-friendly culture that supports your well\\-being and empowers you to grow. Our Be Well programs are thoughtfully designed to support your financial, mental, physical, and social health\\-because we know that when you feel your best, you do your best.
   

  

 From your very first day, you'll dive into impactful work that powers the systems our customers rely on every day. You won't just contribute\\-you'll make a difference, tackling meaningful projects that sharpen your skills and fuel your growth.
   

  

 We're here to champion your journey. With powerful tools to chart your career path, personalized development goals aligned with your ambitions, and continuous feedback to keep you inspired and on track, you'll have everything you need to thrive and evolve. You'll develop in\\-demand skills to grow your career and achieve your ambitions with access to cutting\\-edge learning opportunities\\-from certifications with Microsoft, Google, and Amazon to coaching and hands\\-on experiences. And through it all, you'll be part of a culture that values empathy, restless learning, and a devotion to shared success.
   

  

 We want you to thrive here\\-and we're committed to helping you do just that. Ready to make an impact? Join us and help shape what's next.
   

  

**Get Referred!**

title: ML Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 KPG99 INC is a leading technology firm dedicated to delivering innovative solutions across various industries. With a focus on leveraging cutting\\-edge technologies, KPG99 INC strives to empower organizations through data\\-driven insights and scalable software solutions. The company prides itself on fostering a collaborative and inclusive work environment, encouraging continuous learning and professional growth. As a pioneer in the tech space, KPG99 INC is committed to maintaining the highest standards of quality, integrity, and innovation to meet the evolving needs of its clients worldwide.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join our dynamic team on a contractual basis for an initial period of six months, with the possibility of extension. This remote role offers an excellent opportunity to work on complex machine learning applications, develop scalable pipelines, and contribute to innovative projects that impact our global client base. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in Python, data engineering, and ML workflows, with a proven track record of delivering high\\-quality, production\\-ready solutions. Collaboration across teams and effective communication skills are essential to ensure seamless integration of ML models into broader systems.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a minimum of 8 years of professional experience in machine learning and data engineering roles. Proficiency in Python is essential, with deep knowledge of libraries such as Pandas, Numpy, Matplotlib, Scikit\\-learn, and Pydantic. Strong SQL skills and hands\\-on experience with Snowflake and Snowpark are required. Familiarity with GitHub engineering practices, including pull requests, branching strategies, and automation via Actions, is necessary. Experience with testing frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and automated checks is vital for maintaining high standards of code quality. Candidates should also have expertise in designing config\\-driven, scalable architectures with reusable components, as well as excellent documentation skills. Knowledge of cross\\-team collaboration processes will be an added advantage.
   

  

 Optional but preferred qualifications include experience with Dataiku DSS platform for automation and industrialization, MLflow or other MLOps tools, and optimization methodologies such as cvxpy or Gurobi. Familiarity with containerization using Docker, as well as experience with PyTorch and LightGBM, will be considered advantageous.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The Senior ML Engineer will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying machine learning models and pipelines that address complex business challenges. Key responsibilities include collaborating with data scientists and product teams to understand requirements, translating them into scalable ML solutions, and ensuring models are robust, efficient, and maintainable. The role involves building and maintaining data workflows, integrating models into production environments, and establishing best practices for model validation, monitoring, and retraining.
   

  

 You will lead efforts to develop reusable, config\\-driven architecture components, ensuring that solutions are scalable and adaptable across different projects. The engineer will also be tasked with implementing testing strategies, CI/CD pipelines, and automation processes to streamline deployment workflows. Strong documentation of processes and code is essential for cross\\-team knowledge sharing. Additionally, the role requires active participation in code reviews, mentoring junior team members, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement and innovation.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Joining KPG99 INC as a Senior ML Engineer offers a competitive and comprehensive benefits package, including flexible remote work arrangements, opportunities for professional development, and exposure to cutting\\-edge technologies. The company supports work\\-life balance and provides a collaborative environment that encourages innovation and continuous learning. Employees will have access to industry\\-standard tools and resources, along with opportunities to contribute to impactful projects that drive real\\-world business value. Additionally, KPG99 INC values diversity and inclusion, fostering a workplace where all team members can thrive and grow their careers.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 KPG99 INC is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe in fair treatment and equal opportunities for all, fostering a workplace where everyone can contribute their best and succeed.

title: Senior Software Engineer, Fullstack
description:
**About ValGenesis**
 ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.
   

  

 Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about
   

  

 About the Role:
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal opportunity employer and remuneration to commensurate based on experience and competency and will be in pair with the best in industry.
   

  

**Requirements**
* 4 to 8 years of experience in developing enterprise software products, with cloud native stack
* Strong knowledge of C\\# / .NET Core
* Working knowledge of the JS frameworks \\- React
* Good experience in automating development using combination of AI tools \\- Claude \\+ CoPilot \\+ MCP
* Strong experience in Micro\\-Services and/or Micro\\-Frontend architecture
* Strong experience in container\\-based development, AKS, Service Fabric etc
* Strong experience in messaging queue systems like RabbitMQ, Kafka
* Experience in Azure Services like Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions
* Experience in Relational and No\\-SQL databases like MS SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
* Preferable experience in integrating LLMs, vector databases, RAG into production apps
* Experience in owning/driving end to end development (incl testing) of a functional module/area
* Experience in cross\\-functional collaboration with product owners, senior management etc
* Strong knowledge of Code Quality, Code Monitoring, Performance Engineering, Test Automation Tools
* Knowledge of reporting solutions like PowerBI, Apache SuperSet etc


**Responsibilities**
* Understand the business requirements and technical constraints and architect/design/develop
* Participate in the complete development life cycle
* Lead and Review the architecture/design/code of self and others
* Develop enterprise application features/services using Azure cloud services, C\\# .NET Core, ReactJS etc, implementing AI\\-DevSecOps principles
* Act as a hands\\-on technical leader of a scrum team
* Own and be accountable for the Quality, Performance, Security and Sustenance of the respective product deliverables
* Strive for self\\-excellence along with enabling success of the team/stakeholders
* Appraise the performance of self, peers and team members


**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.
   

  

 Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose\\-built systems with world\\-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.
   

  

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.

title: System Engineer (ARP4754-Aerospace 6+years)
description:
**Job description** 




  





**System Engineer** 
 \\- Aerospace (ARP4754\\)
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore, Pune, Indore
 



**Expeirence : 6** 
 \\+ Years
 



  





 Company Description
 



 Qubist Solutions LLC is a leader in software innovations, architecture, design, development, and testing for industries such as avionics, automotive, medical, railways, IoT, and digital solutions. With extensive expertise in Aerospace and Avionics Software Design, Qubist specializes in development and Verification \\& Validation (V\\&V) processes adhering to RTCA/DO\\-178B standards for software levels A through D. Our company is committed to delivering cutting\\-edge solutions that meet the highest industry standards. Partnering with us means contributing to ground breaking advancements across diverse technical domains.
 



  





 Role Description
 



 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role for a System Engineer \\- Aerospace (ARP4754\\) based in Bangalore, Pune, Indore. The System Engineer will be responsible for designing and overseeing system architecture, ensuring seamless system integration, and leading systems engineering efforts. The role also involves collaborating with software development teams to deliver innovative and reliable avionics solutions, meeting compliance standards and quality requirements.
 



  





 As a key technical leader, you'll be at the forefront of building the embedded networks that power everything from commercial airliners and rotorcraft to next\\-gen military fighters. You’ll play a pivotal role in shaping and deploying resilient, deterministic networks capable of handling the extreme demands of real\\-time flight operations.
 



  





 Skills we need are:
 



 \\- extensive knowledge of avionics systems in part 23 and 25 aircraft (part 27 and 29 helicopters a bonus). Air data, AHRS, GNSS, Flight Management and Flight Control are areas of particular interest. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience with ARP4754B and ARP4761A in preparing FHA and SSA analysis. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience preparing FMEA/FMECA and Fault Tree Analysis. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience preparing reliability, availability, testability and maintainability analysis using MIL\\-HDBK\\-217 and other tools. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience converting customer requirements to system level requirements. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience working with the relevant engineering disciplines to break system requirements down in to high level requirements by discipline. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience writing test plans covering environmental (DO\\-160\\) and operational (MOPS) requirements. 
 



  





 Also:
 



 \\- experience with FAA PSCP development an advantage. 
 



 \\- experience with DO\\-178C and DO\\-254 planing documents advantage. 
 



 \\- experience with DO\\-326B, 356A \\& 355 security plans and processes an advantage. 
 



  





 Excellent written and spoken English are essential. The ability to maintain relationships with Australian, European and US customers is a critical part of this role. 
 



  





 What You Will Do:
 



  




* Architect and design computing systems for aircraft management that meet the stringent requirements of safety\\-critical avionics systems.
* Serve as the technical authority and point of contact for all computing and graphics\\-related questions across multiple programs.
* Capture and translate source requirements into system architecture, interface definitions, and configuration strategies.
* Collaborate with internal computing, graphics, and networking fellows, and cross\\-functional experts to shape the next generation of secure, fault\\-tolerant avionics computing and graphics systems.
* Lead system\\-level integration, troubleshooting, and verification activities in lab environments.
* Drive the development of automated test strategies and tools and ensure robust validation across network interfaces.
* Mentor other systems engineers and collaborate closely with hardware, software, and firmware teams to deliver cohesive and scalable system designs.
* Contribute to the bid and pursuit process, providing technical insight and proposal leadership for networking solutions.
* Willingness to travel as needed.



  





 Qualifications
 


* Typically requires a B.E.\\\\B.Tech\\\\ M.Tech\\\\M.E. and minimum 6 years prior relevant experience in a writing system requirements for avionics systems.
* End\\-to\\-end systems engineering experience: requirements definition, design, integration, V\\&V, and deployment.
* Experience with real\\-time embedded systems, hardware/software interfaces, and systems integration.
* Expertise in designing and specifying computing and graphics architectures, including but not limited to:
* Communication protocols: ARINC 429, MIL\\-STD\\-1553, ARINC 629, or ARINC 818\\.
* Embedded Computing or System on a Chip.
* Experience with safety\\-critical development standards, such as DO\\-178C, DO\\-254, ARP4754B, and ARP4761
* Familiarity with avionics standards such as RTCA/DO\\-178B is a plus
* Ability to work collaboratively in an on\\-site environment in Bengaluru/Pune
* Background in virtualized architectures, data flows, or advanced avionics bus protocols
* Experience with Model\\-Based Systems Engineering
* Excellent interpersonal and technical communication skills, including documentation and interface negotiation
* Strong sense of ownership, mission focus, and the ability to thrive in high\\-reliability aerospace environments
* Familiarity with ARINC 653, ARINC 661, or FACE architecture.
* Experience with software security and partitioning strategies.
* Background in agile methodologies and DevOps for embedded systems.
* Exposure to model\\-based design tools such as SCADE, Simulink, or Enterprise Architect.
* Expertise in C/C\\+\\+ programming, real\\-time operating systems (e.g., VxWorks, INTEGRITY).
* Hands\\-on experience in design and development of FMS, Mission Computer, Display Software, or similar.
* Thorough understanding of software safety standards (DO\\-178C) and system\\-software interfaces.
* Strong analytical skills and experience with architectural modelling tools (e.g., UML, SysML).
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills; experience working with global teams.

description:
Company Description
 
 :

 Qubist Solutions LLC is a leader in providing cutting\\-edge solutions in domains such as Avionics, Embedded Systems, AI/ML, Automotive, Medical, Railways, IoT, and Digital Software Innovations. The company specializes in full\\-lifecycle software architecture, design, development, and testing. **Role Description** 




 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role for an Embedded Hardware Engineer at our location in Pune Division. The Embedded Hardware Engineer will be responsible for designing, developing, and testing hardware systems that conform to Aerospace DO254 standards. Day\\-to\\-day tasks include hardware development, circuit design, and creating robust electronics hardware solutions to support aerospace applications. Collaboration across teams and adhering to regulatory requirements will form a critical part of this role.
 



  





 As a cornerstone of our Pune hardware engineering team, you will drive the design, development, and certification of safety\\-critical embedded hardware. You will ensure that all hardware artifacts are compliant with
 **DO\\-254**

 **DO\\-160G** 
 .
 



  




**Key Responsibilities** 

  




**1\\. Hardware Design \\& DO\\-254 Compliance**

 **DO\\-254**

* Manage
 **DO\\-330** 
 tool qualification processes for hardware design and verification tools used within the project.

* Design hardware to survive extreme conditions including temperature, vibration, and power transients as per
 **DO\\-160G** 
 .
* Conduct pre\\-compliance testing for EMI/EMC and Lightning Induced Transients.

**3\\. Verification \\& Validation (V\\&V)** 
* Author Hardware Verification Plans (HVP) and Procedures (HVP).
* Lead board\\-bring\\-up, hardware\\-software integration, and formal verification testing.

**4\\. Certification \\& Audits** 
* Prepare lifecycle artifacts for Stage of Involvement (SOI) audits (SOI\\#1 to SOI\\#4\\).
* Justify design decisions and verification results to certification authorities or DERs.

**Technical Skills Required**

 Mastery of
 **DO\\-254** 
 ,
 **DO\\-160** 
 , and
 **DO\\-330** 
 .
* **Design Tools:** 
 Proficiency in Altium Designer, Cadence Allegro, or Mentor Graphics.
* **FPGA/ASIC:** 
 Experience in VHDL/Verilog and FPGA\\-based hardware design.
* **Interfaces:** 
 Expertise in
 **ARINC 429, MIL\\-STD\\-1553, AFDX, CAN, PCIe, and Ethernet** 
 .
* **Analysis:** 
 Strong skills in static timing analysis, power analysis, and circuit simulation (PSpice/LTSpice).



  




**Qualifications** 
* B.E./B.Tech or M.Tech in Electronics \\& Communication, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent.
* 5\\+ years (Senior) to 15 years (Lead) of hands\\-on experience in avionics hardware.
* Expertise in Hardware Development and Electronics Hardware Design
* Significant experience in Circuit Design and Computer Hardware
* Experience with Aerospace DO254 standards and requirements

**Why Join Qubist Solutions?**

title: Principal Engineer

**Responsibilities \\-**

 Nice to have:
   

  

  

* Experience with Google Cloud, Django, Postgres, Celery, Redis
